programme.desc: When Jackie (Mila Kunis) discovers that Kelso (Ashton Kutcher) kissed another girl, she bars him from the gang's ski trip. With Topher Grace.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: On Eric and Donna's (Topher Grace, Laura Prepon) first date, the waiter (guest star Dino Meminger) mistakenly serves Donna mixed drinks.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: When Red takes the Vista Cruiser away from Eric, the guys are grounded until Kelso borrows his cousin's car.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: When Jackie (Mila Kunis) has a pregnancy scare, Donna (Laura Prepon) is prompted to start taking birth control pills. With Topher Grace.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam makes a hasty decision after getting upset with his daughter's kindergarten teacher, landing himself and Andi in trouble.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Don persuades Adam to turn his cluttered garage into a man cave; Adam is distraught after thinking he gave away one of Andi's beloved keepsakes.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Lily is accused of smuggling booze into a school dance; Eddie uses Walt as a goon to shake down his shady business associates.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Sean accidentally outs a gay co-worker (guest star Sean O'Bryan) after seeing him at Action Mountain's "gay day"; Eddie brings a date (guest star Natasha Lyonne) to dinner at Sean and Claudia's place.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Smash and Grab and Happy Death Day
programme.desc: The hardware store experiences a smash-and-grab; Dan and Jackie nab one of the culprits; Beverly Rose learns a lesson in remembering loved ones who have passed while keeping their memories alive.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Toilet Hacks and the Management Track
programme.desc: After feeling the cafeteria staff could use some organization, Darlene seeks to be the manager of food services at Mark's college; Dan teaches housewives the basics of DIY home projects to make some extra money toward paying off the house.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: "T-Bone Tot"; "Bride and Seek"; "Grandpa Flips Over It."

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: "Knock-Out Grandma"; "To Serve, Protect and Dance"; "A Really Scary Scarecrow."

programme.title: Hear Better With Audien

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Wounded Warrior Project: No Warrior is Left Behind

programme.desc: Audien Hearing is a leader in over-the-counter hearing aids, committed to making high-quality hearing accessible to all. Discover how advanced, affordable solutions are helping more people experience better hearing every day.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown

programme.desc: Balking at promoting a questionable product jeopardizes Tim's job.

programme.desc: Eve returns home for a weekend visit, and Vanessa tries to re-create a childhood tradition for the girls; Jen asks Ed and Chuck for help in finding out who is stealing her work lunches; Kristin's big day finally arrives.

programme.desc: When Tim and Cindy Devlin crash Gracie's birthday party, they announce that they are getting divorced.
